name: codex-reasoning-assistant
description: Reads the active Codex model and reasoning effort, assesses whether they fit the next phase, and recommends the right configuration for the work ahead.

interface.shortDescription: Assess model and reasoning effort for each task
interface.longDescription: Read the active model and reasoning effort, assess whether they can protect the quality of the next phase, and get a clear recommendation to continue, raise or lower effort, or change models.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my current model and reasoning effort fit this task.
Recommend the next phase's model and reasoning effort.
